debug_info.goal:
a : Type
inst✝ : Inhabited a
ys : List a
f : a → a → a
b : a
bs : List a
z : a
zs : List a
ih : ¬bs = [] → foldr1 f (bs ++ z :: zs) = f (foldr1 f bs) (foldr1 f (z :: zs))
⊢ List.foldr f (f z (List.foldr f b zs)) bs = f (List.foldr f b bs) (List.foldr f z zs)

failed_attempts:
<;>
      (try
        {
          cases bs with
          | nil =>
          | cons b₁ bs₁ =>
            simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1]
            <;>
            (try ring_nf at *)
            <;>
            (try simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1])
            <;>
            (try omega)
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1]
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at *)
          <;>
          (try simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1])
          <;>
          (try omega)
        })

<;> simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1, List.cons, List.nil]
      <;> try cases bs <;> try cases zs <;> simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1, List.cons, List.nil]
      <;> try { aesop }
      <;> try { simp_all [List.foldr, List.foldr1, List.cons, List.nil] }
      <;> try { aesop }

-- Here, we use a dummy value because we are not actually using the result of `minWith₂`.
    (f x, x)

<;> try { aesop }

  <;> try { nlinarith }
